title: Interface Compliance
description: Define an interface and implement it on a struct.
problemStatement:
Interfaces are implicit in Go. Define an interface `Speaker` with a method `Speak() string`. Create a `Dog` struct and implement the `Speak` method to return `"Woof!"`.

**Requirement:** Create a function `GREET(s Speaker)` that prints the result of `s.Speak()`.
hints: If a type defines all methods of an interface, it automagically implements it!
